zh.lifeSummary: 當Ida de Chiny於1142年出生在比利時盧布格尼時，她的父親Albert Ier de Chiny44歲，母親Agnès de Bar24歲。她於1160年與Gobert V d'Aspremont Baron by Saint Louis結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1206年在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾豪-阿爾培斯阿斯普雷蒙特享年64歲。

zh-hans.Chiny, Flemish Brabant, Kingdom of Franc: 法国德 艾斯特姆斯布拉班特

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ida de Chiny于1142年出生在比利时盧布格尼时，她的父亲Albert Ier de Chiny44岁，母亲Agnès de Bar24岁。她于1160年与Gobert V d'Aspremont Baron by Saint Louis结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1206年在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾豪-阿爾培斯阿斯普雷蒙特享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Chiny
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian: from the feminine form of the personal name   Chino  .
Italian (Sicily): nickname from chinu, china ‘full of water, bloated, fat’.
English: probably a variant of the extinct name Chiney through association with the country-name.

variants.name: Chino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Avelino, Ezequiel, Fernando, Francisco, Homero, Humberto, Joaquin, Jose Hector, Manuel, Maricela, Paulino.  Japanese Aki, Hideki, Hirohito, Hiroki, Kazumi, Kazuo, Shigeru, Taro, Yuriko, Yutaka.
Hispanic (mainly Mexico): from Mexican Spanish adjective chino ‘curly’. This surname is also common among Native Americans (Pueblos) in NM.
Hispanic and Amerindian (Peru and Bolivia): nickname from chino ‘person of mixed Amerindian and European parentage’ or ‘servant’, a word of Quechuan origin.

nameMeanings.name: Ida
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Norman name, of Germanic origin, derived from īd ‘work’. This died out during the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, influenced by its use in Tennyson's The Princess ( 1847 ) for the central character, who devotes herself to the cause of women's rights and women's education in a thoroughly Victorian way. The name is also associated with Mount Ida in Crete, which was connected in classical times with the worship of Zeus, king of the gods, who was supposed to have been brought up in a cave on the mountainside. In the 1930s it became famous as the name of the film star Ida Lupino ( 1914–1995 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Ida de Chiny was born in 1142, in Chiny, Luxembourg, Belgium, her father, Albert Ier de Chiny, was 44 and her mother, Agnès de Bar, was 24. She married Gobert V d'Aspremont Baron by Saint Louis in 1160. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1206, in Aspremont, Hautes-Alpes, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ida de Chiny est née en 1142, à Chiny, Luxembourg, Belgique, son père, Albert Ier de Chiny, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Agnès de Bar, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Gobert V d'Aspremont Baron by Saint Louis en 1160. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1206, à Aspremont, Hautes-Alpes, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ida de Chiny 1142 in Chiny, Luxemburg, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Albert Ier de Chiny 44 und ihre Mutter Agnès de Bar 24. Sie hat 1160 Gobert V d'Aspremont Baron by Saint Louis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1206 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Aspremont, Hautes-Alpes, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ida de Chiny è nata il nel 1142 nel Chiny, Lussemburgo, Belgio, sua padre, Albert Ier de Chiny, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Agnès de Bar, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Gobert V d'Aspremont Baron by Saint Louis nel 1160. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1206, nel Aspremont, Hautes-Alpes, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.Chiny, Luxembourg, Belgium: ベルギールクセンボウルグチニー
ja.Chiny, Flemish Brabant, Kingdom of Franc: フランスグランド エストメウゼブラバント
ja.Aspremont, Verdun-sur-Meuse France: フランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルハウテス-アルペスアスプレモント
ja.Liege, Lotharingia, Holy Roman Empire: ヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチリeッジ
ja.lifeSummary: Ida de Chinyが1142年にベルギールクセンボウルグチニーで生まれた時，父Albert Ier de Chinyは44歳，母Agnès de Barは24歳であった。1160年にGobert V d'Aspremont Baron by Saint Louisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1206年にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルハウテス-アルペスアスプレモントで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ida de Chiny(이)가 1142년 벨기에 루세보우르그 친이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Albert Ier de Chiny(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnès de Bar(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1160년 Gobert V d'Aspremont Baron by Saint Louis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1206년 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 하츠-알프스 아스프렘트에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ida de Chiny nasceu em 1142, em Chiny, Luxemburgo, Bélgica, seu pai, Albert Ier de Chiny, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Agnès de Bar, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Gobert V d'Aspremont Baron by Saint Louis em 1160. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1206, em Aspremont, Hautes-Alpes, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ida de Chiny родилась в 1142 г. в местности чини, луксембург, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Albert Ier de Chiny было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Agnès de Bar, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gobert V d'Aspremont Baron by Saint Louis в 1160 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1206 г. в местности аспремонт, хаутес-алпесь, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ida de Chiny nació en 1142, en Chiny, Luxemburgo, Bélgica, su papá, Albert Ier de Chiny, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Agnès de Bar, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Gobert V d'Aspremont Baron by Saint Louis en 1160. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1206, en Aspremont, Hautes-Alpes, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, a la edad de 64 años.
